title: task
description: python/src/lichen/ipv6/icmpv6.py:230-241 - The handle_icmpv6() function parses and processes ICMPv6 Echo Requests without verifying the checksum. Per RFC 4443 section 2.3: 'If a received ICMPv6 message contains a checksum that fails to verify, the message MUST be silently discarded.' Currently, corrupted or forged Echo Requests with invalid checksums will still trigger Echo Replies. The Icmpv6Message class has a verify_checksum() static method but it is never called. Fix: call Icmpv6Message.verify_checksum(packet.header.src_addr, packet.header.dst_addr, packet.payload) at the start of handle_icmpv6() and return None if it fails.
close_reason: Fixed: Added RFC 4443 section 2.3 compliant checksum verification to handle_icmpv6(). Packets with invalid checksums are now silently discarded before processing. Added test_handle_discards_invalid_checksum to verify the fix.
